svg.text: McCzarny recently dedicated significant effort
to his chromium-daily-digest project, focusing
on robust Gemini AI integration. He implemented
a fallback mechanism to a backup Gemini model
and enhanced retry logic to handle API rate
limits and server overloads more effectively.
He refined daily rate limit detection and
removed fixed delays on retries for better
responsiveness, while also updating the primary
Gemini model to 'gemini-3.5-flash'. To comply
with API token limits, he reduced the chunk
sizes for LLM processing and added several
missing Chromium summaries for various dates.
Concurrently, in his crater-js game, he
introduced a new Stone Beetle mob with distinct
larva and adult forms and expanded the worm's
animation with more frames. He also added
region modifiers and icons, along with
implementing traits and trait icons for
characters. Game mechanics were refined to
include falling boulder damage, snap-to-grid
functionality for actions, and a new mining
animation. McCzarny also renamed "World" to
"Region" in crater-js and added more surface
openings. He reported a bug in microsoft/vscode
regarding the agent mode failing to process
prompts due to a session timeout.
Generated on: Sun Jun 7 04:21:51 2026
